_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
source_files: Nerve Repair Surgery, Exploration and Ulnar nerve Repair_Medco.pdf
Nerve Repair Surgery,Exploration and Ulnar nerve Repair_PPD.CPD.pdf
clinical_indications: Blunt Injuries, falls, traction injuries, motor vehicle accidents, sharp trauma, direct cut from a knife that requires surgical reconstruction.
Sensory and motor function defects that can result in complete paralysis of the affected limb or development of intractable neuropathic pain.

preauth.label: Clinical notes with history, signs, symptoms, evaluation findings, indication for procedure, planned line of management and advice for admission
MRI / EMG/ NCV report to confirm the diagnosis

claim.label: Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes with history, signs, symptoms, evaluation findings, indication for procedure, planned line of management and advice for admission submitted?
MRI / EMG/ NCV of the affected part labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/ Right) - confirming the diagnosis submitted?
X-ray of affected part labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/ Right) submitted?
Radiological investigations confirming the need of surgery; +/- NCV report submitted?

cpd_claim.q: Are Detailed Indoor case papers (ICPs) submitted?
Are the Post procedure clinical photographs submitted?
Are the detailed Procedure / Operative notes submitted?
Is there a Detailed Discharge Summary submitted?

common_queries: Clinical notes with history, signs, symptoms, evaluation findings, indication for procedure, planned line of management and advice for admission are missing or incomplete.
MRI / EMG/ NCV report to confirm the diagnosis is missing or incomplete, or does not confirm the diagnosis.
The clinical notes and imaging reports submitted are not indicative of surgery.
Detailed Indoor case papers (ICPs) are missing or incomplete.
Detailed procedure / Operative Notes are missing or incomplete.
Discharge summary with follow-up advice at the time of discharge is missing or incomplete.

clinical_key_pointers: Usually with blunt Injuries, falls, traction injuries, motor vehicle accidents, sharp trauma, direct cut from a knife that requires surgical reconstruction.
Symptoms of nerve injury: Sensory and motor function defects that can result in complete paralysis of the affected limb or development of intractable neuropathic pain.
surgical_options: Surgical nerve repair involves exploration of the injured nerve and removal of injured tissue or scar from the nerve endings.
Procedures also involved in the repair includes; alignment of the fascicles, Nerve grafting, conduit, donated nerve tissues.
